nasb.text: Therefore the anger of the Lord was kindled against His people And He abhorred His inheritance.

esv.text: Then the anger of the Lord was kindled against his people, and he abhorred his heritage;

cnv.text: 所以耶和華的怒氣向他的子民發作； 他厭惡自己的產業，

ccb.text: 耶和华因此向祂的子民发怒， 厌恶他们，

csbs.text: 于是耶和华的怒气向他的子民发作； 他厌恶自己的继业，
